query: DELETE FROM deals WHERE name LIKE 'Test Deal%' OR name LIKE 'Debug Test%'; DELETE FROM scan_jobs WHERE status IN ('pending', 'running') AND completedAt IS NULL; SELECT COUNT(*) as deals FROM deals; SELECT COUNT(*) as scan_jobs FROM scan_jobs;
